title: importResult
description: Object containing information about bulk import state.

importState.description:
Current state of the import. The possible values are:
- `Uploaded`: The file was successfully uploaded.
- `InValidation`: File validation is in progress.
- `ReadyToImport`: File validation completed, ready for import.
- `Completed`: File successfully imported.
- `ValidationFailed`: File validation failed.
- `CompletedWithError`: File import failed.

lastUpdateDate.description: Date and time of the last update of the import, in `yyyy-mm-ddTHH:MM:SS+00:00` format.

fileName.description: Name of the file being imported.

importedAt.description: Date and time when the import was completed, in `yyyy-mm-ddTHH:MM:SS+00:00` format.

importedUserEmail.description: Email address of the user who performed the import.

importedUserName.description: Name of the user who performed the import.

importResult.description: Information about the outcome of the bulk import operation.

reportDownloadLink.description: A link to download a detailed report on the outcome of the bulk import.

imports.description: Detailed information about the imported items.

name.description: Unique identifier associated with the imported item.

importedRows.description: Total number of lines successfully imported.

rowsWithError.description: Total number of lines that encountered errors during import.
